name: LibreChat
description: Self-hosts an open ChatGPT-style platform with custom Agents, MCP tools, Code Interpreter, and multi-provider models. Exposes OpenAPI actions and an API for programmatic use. 40k+ stars, MIT.

skills.name: Custom Agents
skills.description: Builds no-code agents that combine models, MCP tools, and OpenAPI actions for repeatable multi-step tasks.

skills.name: MCP Tools
skills.description: Connects agents to external systems through Model Context Protocol servers configured per deployment.

skills.name: Code Interpreter
skills.description: Runs generated code in a secure sandbox to analyze data, produce files, and return results in chat.
